channel.title: easy-vegan-posts Posts - RSS Feed
channel.description: Fresh easy-vegan-posts posts and cooking inspiration

item.title: Fresh Spring Nail Art Ideas You Can Easily Do at Home
item.description: Brighten your look with these simple spring nail designs that anyone can try at home. Featuring soft pastels and delicate floral accents, they're perfect for adding a fresh vibe to your style this season.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 1

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • Base coat polish, 1 coat
  • Pastel nail polishes, assorted colors
  • Fine nail art brush or dotting tool
  • Top coat polish, 1 coat
  • Optional: floral nail stickers or decals

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #polish #pastel #brush

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Fresh Spring Nail Art Ideas You Can Easily Do at Home
media:content.media:description: Brighten your look with these simple spring nail designs that anyone can try at home. Featuring soft pastels and delicate floral accents, they're perfect for adding a fresh vibe to your style this season.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, polish, pastel, brush

item.title: Creamy Avocado Chickpea Salad with Zesty Lemon-Tahini Dressing
item.description: This salad is a fresh, vibrant mix of creamy avocado and hearty chickpeas tossed in a tangy lemon-tahini dressing. It's light but filling, perfect for a quick lunch or a spring dinner. I love how the dressing brightens up every bite!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 ripe avocados, peeled and diced
  • 1 can (15 oz) chickpeas, drained and rinsed
  • 1 small cucumber, diced
  • 1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
  • 1/4 cup fresh parsley, chopped
  • 3 tablespoons tahini
  • 2 tablespoons fresh lemon juice
  • 1 garlic clove, minced
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • Salt and pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #avocados #chickpeas #small

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Creamy Avocado Chickpea Salad with Zesty Lemon-Tahini Dressing
media:content.media:description: This salad is a fresh, vibrant mix of creamy avocado and hearty chickpeas tossed in a tangy lemon-tahini dressing. It's light but filling, perfect for a quick lunch or a spring dinner. I love how the dressing brightens up every bite!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, avocados, chickpeas, small

item.title: Fresh & Vibrant Vegan Pea and Mint Soup for Sunny Days
item.description: This vegan pea and mint soup is a bright, fresh bowl that feels like spring in every spoonful. Using frozen peas keeps it quick and easy, while fresh mint adds a cool twist. Great for a light lunch or a starter when the sun’s shining!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 500g frozen peas
  • 1 small onion, finely chopped
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 750ml vegetable broth
  • 15g fresh mint leaves, chopped
  • 1 tbsp olive oil
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Juice of half a lemon

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #frozen #small #cloves

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Fresh & Vibrant Vegan Pea and Mint Soup for Sunny Days
media:content.media:description: This vegan pea and mint soup is a bright, fresh bowl that feels like spring in every spoonful. Using frozen peas keeps it quick and easy, while fresh mint adds a cool twist. Great for a light lunch or a starter when the sun’s shining!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, frozen, small, cloves

item.title: Quick & Cozy Vegan Chickpea Curry with Fresh Spring Veggies
item.description: This vibrant vegan chickpea curry is packed with fresh spring veggies and warming spices. It’s super easy to make and perfect for a cozy weeknight dinner when you want comfort without the hassle.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 tablespoons olive oil, extra virgin
  • 1 medium onion, finely chopped
  • 3 garlic cloves, minced
  • 1 tablespoon fresh ginger, grated
  • 1 teaspoon cumin seeds
  • 1 teaspoon ground turmeric
  • 1 tablespoon garam masala
  • 1 teaspoon chili powder, adjust to taste
  • 1 can (14 oz) diced tomatoes
  • 2 cups vegetable broth
  • 2 cans (15 oz each) chickpeas, drained and rinsed
  • 1 cup fresh green beans, trimmed and halved
  • 1 medium carrot, sliced thin
  • 1 cup fresh peas, shelled
  • Salt to taste
  • Fresh cilantro, chopped for garnish
  • Cooked basmati rice, for serving

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #olive #medium #garlic

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Quick & Cozy Vegan Chickpea Curry with Fresh Spring Veggies
media:content.media:description: This vibrant vegan chickpea curry is packed with fresh spring veggies and warming spices. It’s super easy to make and perfect for a cozy weeknight dinner when you want comfort without the hassle.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, olive, medium, garlic

item.title: Easy Tofu Stir-Fry with Fresh Spring Greens and Tangy Sauce
item.description: This tofu stir-fry bursts with fresh spring greens and a tangy sauce that’s both light and satisfying. Pressing the tofu until crispy is the game changer here. Ideal for a quick weeknight dinner when you want something healthy but tasty!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 14 oz extra firm tofu, pressed and cubed
  • 2 tbsp vegetable oil
  • 3 cups mixed spring greens (baby spinach, bok choy, snow peas)
  • 1 red bell pepper, thinly sliced
  • 3 garlic cloves, minced
  • 1 tbsp fresh ginger, minced
  • 3 tbsp soy sauce
  • 1 tbsp rice vinegar
  • 1 tbsp maple syrup
  • 1 tsp sesame oil
  • 1 tsp cornstarch mixed with 2 tbsp water
  • 1 tbsp toasted sesame seeds
  • 2 green onions, sliced

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #extra #vegetable #mixed

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Easy Tofu Stir-Fry with Fresh Spring Greens and Tangy Sauce
media:content.media:description: This tofu stir-fry bursts with fresh spring greens and a tangy sauce that’s both light and satisfying. Pressing the tofu until crispy is the game changer here. Ideal for a quick weeknight dinner when you want something healthy but tasty!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, extra, vegetable, mixed

item.title: Fresh Vegan Chickpea Salad with Creamy Avocado Dressing for Light Lunches
item.description: This vegan chickpea salad is packed with crisp spring veggies and a creamy avocado dressing that’s tangy and satisfying. It’s quick to make and perfect for a healthy lunch or picnic on sunny days.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 can (15 oz) chickpeas, drained and rinsed
  • 1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
  • 1 medium cucumber, diced
  • 1/2 red bell pepper, diced
  • 1 small red onion, finely chopped
  • 1 ripe avocado
  • 2 tablespoons fresh lemon juice
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 clove garlic, minced
  • 1/4 cup fresh cilantro, chopped
  • Salt and pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #chickpeas #cherry #medium

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Fresh Vegan Chickpea Salad with Creamy Avocado Dressing for Light Lunches
media:content.media:description: This vegan chickpea salad is packed with crisp spring veggies and a creamy avocado dressing that’s tangy and satisfying. It’s quick to make and perfect for a healthy lunch or picnic on sunny days.

item.title: Quick and Tangy Vegan Stir-Fry with Crispy Tofu and Spring Greens
item.description: This vegan stir-fry is a fresh, vibrant dish combining crispy tofu and spring greens with a zesty tamari-lime sauce. It’s quick to whip up and perfect for a light, healthy dinner any day of the week!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 14 oz extra-firm tofu, pressed and cubed
  • 2 tablespoons tamari (or soy sauce)
  • 1 tablespoon fresh lime juice
  • 1 tablespoon maple syrup
  • 2 tablespoons vegetable oil
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 teaspoon grated fresh ginger
  • 4 cups mixed spring greens (baby spinach, pea shoots, bok choy, etc.)
  • 1 red bell pepper, thinly sliced
  • 1/2 cup sliced green onions
  • 1 tablespoon toasted sesame seeds
  • Salt and pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #extrafirm #tamari #tablespoon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Quick and Tangy Vegan Stir-Fry with Crispy Tofu and Spring Greens
media:content.media:description: This vegan stir-fry is a fresh, vibrant dish combining crispy tofu and spring greens with a zesty tamari-lime sauce. It’s quick to whip up and perfect for a light, healthy dinner any day of the week!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, extrafirm, tamari, tablespoon

item.title: Fresh Vegan Spring Soup with Tender Veggies and Bright Herbs
item.description: This vibrant vegan spring soup is packed with tender vegetables and fresh herbs. A splash of lemon juice lifts all the flavors, making it perfect for a light lunch or a cozy dinner when you want something fresh yet comforting.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 tablespoons olive oil, extra virgin
  • 1 medium onion, finely chopped
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 2 medium carrots, diced
  • 2 celery stalks, diced
  • 1 medium zucchini, diced
  • 4 cups vegetable broth, low sodium
  • 1 cup green beans, trimmed and cut
  • 1 cup fresh peas, shelled
  • 1/4 cup fresh parsley, chopped
  • 1/4 cup fresh dill, chopped
  • Juice of 1 lemon
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #olive #medium #cloves

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Fresh Vegan Spring Soup with Tender Veggies and Bright Herbs
media:content.media:description: This vibrant vegan spring soup is packed with tender vegetables and fresh herbs. A splash of lemon juice lifts all the flavors, making it perfect for a light lunch or a cozy dinner when you want something fresh yet comforting.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, olive, medium, cloves

item.title: Easy 30-Minute Vibrant Vegan Tofu Stir-Fry with Fresh Greens
item.description: This quick vegan stir-fry is packed with crispy tofu and fresh greens, all coated in a savory sauce. The tofu gets a flavorful boost from a simple marinade. Great for busy weeknights when you want something healthy and fast!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 14 oz firm tofu, drained and pressed
  • 2 cups broccoli florets, fresh
  • 1 red bell pepper, sliced thin
  • 2 cups baby spinach leaves
  • 3 tbsp soy sauce, low sodium
  • 1 tbsp maple syrup or agave
  • 1 tbsp rice vinegar
  • 1 tsp grated fresh ginger
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 2 tbsp vegetable oil
  • 1 tsp toasted sesame oil
  • 1 tsp cornstarch mixed with 2 tbsp water
  • Sesame seeds for garnish (optional)
  • Cooked jasmine rice or noodles, to serve

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #drained #broccoli #pepper

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Easy 30-Minute Vibrant Vegan Tofu Stir-Fry with Fresh Greens
media:content.media:description: This quick vegan stir-fry is packed with crispy tofu and fresh greens, all coated in a savory sauce. The tofu gets a flavorful boost from a simple marinade. Great for busy weeknights when you want something healthy and fast!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, drained, broccoli, pepper
